form_factor.comment: CLI + Open VSX extension + hosted on platform.openai.com. TypeScript (@openai/codex-sdk) and experimental Python SDKs for programmatic control. Per-form-factor links: CLI: https://developers.openai.com/codex/cli/; Extension: https://developers.openai.com/codex/ide/; SDK: https://developers.openai.com/codex/sdk/; Web: https://chatgpt.com/codex; Mac App: https://developers.openai.com/codex/app/.

latest_major_update.comment: Captured from current Codex docs/changelog state.

rules.comment: Uses AGENTS.md instructions. Location: `AGENTS.md` in repo tree, plus user/project Codex config for defaults.

skills.comment: Supports SKILL.md-based skills. Location: `.codex/skills/<name>/SKILL.md`, `~/.codex/skills/<name>/SKILL.md`, or installed plugin skill folders.

mcp_servers.comment: Supports MCP servers. Location: `~/.codex/config.toml` under MCP/server configuration.

custom_commands.comment: CLI supports slash-like workflows through prompts and tooling, but not a first-class command folder in this matrix. Location: no separate command folder documented; command-like workflows are provided by prompts, skills, plugins, and CLI slash commands.

goal_command.comment: Built-in `/goal` sets a persistent thread objective with pause, resume, view, and clear; Codex keeps working until the goal is met or you stop it. Enable with `features.goals` in config if missing from the slash menu.

subagents.comment: Codex supports sub-agent/delegation workflows in agent contexts.

sandbox_mode.comment: Filesystem sandbox modes can be configured.

continue.comment: Supports continuing a previous session through resume/latest-session workflows.

statusline.comment: Supports statusline configuration in local CLI settings.

telemetry.comment: Telemetry settings are documented in the CLI repository.

custom_model_provider.comment: Supports custom model providers in config.

pricing.value: Free (limited), Plus $20/mo, Pro $100-200/mo, Business pay-as-you-go, API usage-based
pricing.comment: Free tier has limited Codex access. Plus ($20/mo) includes 15-350 local messages/5h. Pro $100/mo at 5x limits ($200/mo at 20x). Business at pay-as-you-go token credits. API key at per-token pricing.

hosted_agent.comment: Can run locally or on platform.openai.com managed infrastructure.

transcripts.comment: Location: Codex session event streams are JSONL under `~/.codex/sessions/YYYY/MM/DD/rollout-<iso>-<id>.jsonl`.
